title: Debugging Guide
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Markdown document containing a step-by-step debugging guide for a hypothetical web application. The guide should cover error identification, debugging techniques, and troubleshooting best practices.
constraints: Must be organized into clear sections
Must include at least 5 debugging techniques

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated Markdown document should have a clear and logical structure
The generated document should accurately and comprehensively cover debugging techniques and best practices
The generated document should be well-formatted and easy to read
